mapper.sql: id, company_code, company_name, plan_version, demand_source_type, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, warehouse_no, warehouse_name, aggregation_period, demand_horizon_begin_time, demand_horizon_end_time, `status`, is_delete, create_time, create_user_id, create_user_name, update_time, update_user_id, tenant_id, demand_type
mapper.insert: insert into pl_demand_plan (company_code, company_name, plan_version, demand_source_type, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, warehouse_no, warehouse_name, aggregation_period, demand_horizon_begin_time, demand_horizon_end_time, `status`, is_delete, create_time, create_user_id, create_user_name, update_time, update_user_id, tenant_id, demand_type) values (#{companyCode}, #{companyName}, #{planVersion}, #{demandSourceType}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{logicalPlantName}, #{warehouseNo}, #{warehouseName}, #{aggregationPeriod}, #{demandHorizonBeginTime}, #{demandHorizonEndTime}, #{status}, #{deleted}, #{createTime}, #{creatorId}, #{createUserName}, #{updateTime}, #{updatorId}, #{tenantId}, #{demandType})

insert into pl_demand_plan
company_code, company_name, plan_version, demand_source_type, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, warehouse_no, warehouse_name, aggregation_period, demand_horizon_begin_time, demand_horizon_end_time, `status`, is_delete, create_time, create_user_id, create_user_name, update_time, update_user_id, tenant_id, demand_type,
#{companyCode}, #{companyName}, #{planVersion}, #{demandSourceType}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{logicalPlantName}, #{warehouseNo}, #{warehouseName}, #{aggregationPeriod}, #{demandHorizonBeginTime}, #{demandHorizonEndTime}, #{status}, #{deleted}, #{createTime}, #{creatorId}, #{createUserName}, #{updateTime}, #{updatorId}, #{tenantId}, #{demandType},
mapper.update: update pl_demand_plan set company_code = #{companyCode}, company_name = #{companyName}, plan_version = #{planVersion}, demand_source_type = #{demandSourceType}, logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo}, logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName}, warehouse_no = #{warehouseNo}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, aggregation_period = #{aggregationPeriod}, demand_horizon_begin_time = #{demandHorizonBeginTime}, demand_horizon_end_time = #{demandHorizonEndTime}, `status` = #{status}, is_delete = #{deleted}, update_user_id = #{updatorId}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, demand_type = #{demandType} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select plm.id as plm_id, plm.material_code, plm.material_desc, plm.material_unit, plm.logical_plant_no, plm_p.id as period_id, plm_p.plan_period, plm_p.plan_amount, plm_p.ext_info from pl_demand_plan_material plm left join pl_demand_plan_material_period plm_p on plm.id = plm_p.demand_plan_material_id where plm.is_delete = 0 and plm_p.is_delete = 0 and plm.status != 2 and plm_p.status != 2 and plm.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and plm.demand_plan_id = #{demandPlanId} ORDER BY plan_period
